name: @janumipwb/rph-demo
description: M14 demonstration UI — a SvelteKit + Svelte Flow surface that visualizes the RPH PWU decomposition (4 state axes, no-green-without-assurance) over the pure rph-projections read-model seam (never the Node engine facade). Run from the repo root with: bun install && bun run --filter @janumipwb/rph-demo dev  (this monorepo pins Bun via devEngines; npm will refuse). Or from this dir: bun run dev.
